name: Kraton Corporation
description: Kraton Corporation is a leading global producer of specialty polymers and high-performance bio-based chemicals derived from pine wood pulping co-products. The company provides innovative, sustainable solutions for a wide range of markets, including adhesives, coatings, consumer products, medical solutions, and paving. Headquartered in The Woodlands, Texas, Kraton focuses on delivering value through advanced material science, helping customers improve product performance while reducing their environmental footprint. As a subsidiary of DL Chemical, the company continues to drive circular economy initiatives and sustainable innovation across its global manufacturing and research operations.
